name: ContractDates
description: start/end/duration of my contract, how long is left in my contract.

sampleUtterances.utterance: When is my contract finished?
What is the exact end date of my current agreement?
Please tell me when my broadband contract expires.
I want to check the termination date of my Virgin Media plan.
Can you confirm the date my contract is up?
When does my mobile contract end?
How long do I have left on my current contract?
Find out how many months are remaining in my minimum term.
Am I still in contract or has it already expired?
Tell me the length of my contract and how much time remains.
How much longer is my broadband agreement for?
I need to verify my contract start and end dates.
I can’t find my contract info online; when does it finish?
Can you check if my contract end date changed recently?
I need to know if my account is currently out of contract.
Show me the dates for my existing package and when it expires.
I was told my contract ends in February; can you confirm that?
What happens to my contract date if I sell my home?
Does my contract end automatically at the end of the term?
Talk to me about my account status after my contract ends.
I want to see my contract term details.
Contract end date?
When is my contact up?
Check my account expiration.
How long left on my deal?
